Sole Proprietorship (SP): (Անհատ ձեռնարկատեր (ԱՁ)): A business owned by one individual, with the owner personally liable for all debts.
Limited Liability Company (LLC): (Սահմանափակ պատասխանատվությամբ ընկերություն (ՍՊԸ)): A business entity where owners' liability is limited to their investment in the company. 
Joint Stock Company (JSC): (Բաց բաժնետիրական ընկերություն (ԲԲԸ)): A company with shareholders whose liability is limited to their shareholdings, can be public or private.
General Partnership (GP): (Ընդհանուր համատեղ ձեռնարկություն (ԸՀՁ)): A business owned by two or more partners who share management duties and are personally liable for debts. 
Limited Partnership (LP): (Սահմանափակ պատասխանատվությամբ համատեղ ձեռնարկություն (ՍՊՀՁ)): A partnership with both general partners (who manage and are liable) and limited partners (who invest and have limited liability).
